paperTitle: Back to Basics: Denoising Models Demystified
content:
## Back to Basics: Denoising Models Demystified

Return to fundamental principles of diffusion and denoising models, clarifying core concepts for improved understanding and implementation.

### Core Concept

Foundational approach to understanding denoising-based generation

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13720

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When implementing or debugging generative models
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: Back to Basics: Let Denoising Generative Models Denoise
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13720
